calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hudson Bair of The Chanler Group telephone number 510-848-8880 for Plaintiff Peter Englander.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Continued To Aug-03-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
